title: Developmental milestone review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.
examination.rationale: Supports age-specific milestones, parent history, examination and documentation for developmental milestone review; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.

exact_section.heading: 1. Standard Scope; 3.1 History Components; 3.2 Comprehensive Physical Examination

investigations.text: Defines developmental and autism screening prompts, parent concern, walking, speech and social domains, and referral pathways for concerning screening results.
investigations.rationale: Supports motor, speech, social, autism-screening and referral context for developmental milestone review; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines developmental and autism screening prompts, parent concern, walking, speech and social domains, and referral pathways for concerning screening results.

exact_section.heading: Appendix 5 — Developmental Delays Screening; Appendix 6 — Normal Developmental Milestones

additions.text: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, gross and fine motor, language, social, adaptive skills, regression, hearing, vision, screening tool, examination and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for developmental milestone review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
